common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to add shop discount item.

error_list.name: discount.model_id_repeated

request_params.name: discount_id
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a discount activity.

request_params.name: item_list

children.name: item_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an item.

children.name: item_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price of the item. If the item has no variation, this param is necessary.

children.name: item_promotion_stock
children.description: The reserved stock of the item.

children.name: model_list
model_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a variation of an item. If there is no variation of this item, you don't need to input this param. Dafault is 0.

children.name: model_promotion_price
children.description: The discount price of the item.

children.name: model_promotion_stock
children.description: The reserved stock of the model, default is no limit, and can not update. To edit the promotion stock, you need to delete the exist discount and re-add again.
The models which belongs to this item.

children.name: purchase_limit
children.description: The max number of this product in the promotion price. If it's No Limit, please input the 0 for this request data.

request_params.description: The items added in this discount promotion.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking

children.name: discount_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a discount activity.

children.name: count
children.description: The number of items that add successfully.

children.name: item_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an item.

children.name: model_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a variation of an item. If there is no variation of this item, you don't need to input this param. Dafault is 0.

children.name: fail_message
children.description: Indicate error details if one element hit error.

children.name: fail_error
children.description: Indicate error type if one element hit error.
